chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 658 of 2021 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders as to maintainability of petition. 17.04.2025 Ms. Sofia Saeed Shah, advocate for the petitioners. Mr. Talha Javed, advocate for the respondents No.3 & 4. Mr. Sandeep Malani, Assistant Advocate General Sindh. This petition is pending since 2021 and remains listed for orders as to maintainability. Prima facie, writ is sought against the private respondents, which does not fall under Article 199 of the Constitution. Petition is found to be mis-conceived, hence, dismissed. Judge Judge Khuhro/PA
